admin_awards_crit_king: Criterion: First in the overall individual ranking of the LAN.
admin_awards_crit_slayer: Criterion: Player who inflicted the most solo losses.
admin_awards_crit_team: Criterion: Members of the team with the most points.
admin_awards_desc1: End-of-LAN awards are calculated in real-time based on game statistics from tournaments (live or closed).
admin_awards_desc2: You can customize the title and description of each category.
admin_awards_desc3: Descriptions support statistic interpolation to display dynamic values.
admin_awards_desc4: Award notifications are not sent automatically upon calculation. Adjust your settings then click "Broadcast Prizes" to notify them.
admin_awards_interpolation_tip: Descriptions support variable interpolation for winner statistics (e.g.: {points}, {wins}, {matches_played}, {team_name}).
admin_awards_none_available: No distinctions available at the moment
admin_chats_select: Select a conversation to monitor or reply.
admin_chats_system_control: AI manages this conversation — Click "Take control" to intervene
admin_games_nuke_affected_warning: This game has active tournaments. Deleting it will also destroy:
admin_games_nuke_cascade_desc: This game is currently used by {count} tournament(s):
admin_games_nuke_cascade_warning: Deleting this game will result in the permanent and irreversible destruction of these tournaments, including:
admin_games_nuke_confirm_checkbox: I confirm that I want to delete the game and permanently destroy all associated tournaments and scores.
admin_games_nuke_desc: You are about to delete the game {name} from the library.
admin_languages_modal_autotranslate_desc: Automatic translation will use your local Ollama instance (the same model as the Alanbix assistant). For a full translation of all texts at once, this may take several dozen seconds depending on the power of your graphics card.
admin_languages_toast_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete the {lang} language?
admin_languages_toast_sync_done: {count} missing key(s) added to the file.
admin_languages_toast_sync_uptodate: All keys are already up to date.
admin_languages_unsaved_warning: You have unsaved changes. Do you really want to leave this page?
admin_settings_ai_instances_sub: Distributed servers for AI requests — sorted by priority
admin_settings_ai_prompts_sub: Customize instructions given to the models
admin_settings_ai_queue_empty: No requests in queue — GPU is idle
admin_settings_ai_rag_empty: No documents in the knowledge base.
admin_settings_ai_rag_placeholder: Copy-paste your tutorials, patchnotes or specific rules here...
admin_settings_ai_rag_sub: Indexed files providing context to the AI
admin_settings_default_pts_sub: Values used when creating a new tournament
admin_settings_del_games_sub: Deletes the game library, which also deletes all tournaments.
admin_settings_del_players_sub: Deletes all non-admin accounts and associated data.
admin_settings_del_tourneys_sub: Tournaments, scores, teams, participants. Resets players points to 0.
admin_settings_i18n_sub: Define language preferences for the LAN
admin_settings_lan_name_sub: Visible on Dashboard and Projector view
admin_settings_purge_awards_sub: Deletes all awards granted to players
admin_settings_purge_chat_sub: Deletes all images attached to AI conversations
admin_settings_purge_notifs_sub: Deletes all notifications for all players
admin_toast_rag_added: Document vectorized and added to RAG database.
admin_tourneys_mgmt_subtitle: Edit, manage or delete your competitions
admin_tourneys_wizard_points_hint: Bonus/Score = bonus from floor (entered value) to ceiling (2x) depending on the cumulative score of each player/team
admin_tourneys_wizard_use_wizard: Use the wizard on the left to create one
ai_admin_banner: An administrator is managing this conversation — the AI is temporarily paused
ai_banner_sent: {admin} sent a message in your conversation
ai_blocked: Your access to the AI has been suspended by an administrator
ai_confirm_delete_desc: Do you really want to delete this conversation?
ai_confirm_delete_msg_desc: Do you want to delete this message?
ai_confirm_regen_desc: Do you want to regenerate the last response? The old one will be overwritten.
ai_confirm_revert_desc: Do you want to restore the original context?
ai_context_empty: No compressed content available. The LLM returned no result.
ai_context_free_options: Choose how to free up space:
ai_context_full_desc: Your message exceeds the AI's memory capacity. Choose how to compress the context before sending:
ai_context_option_compact_desc: Remove useless duplicates without changing meaning (~50% gain).
ai_context_option_summary_desc: Ultra-concise summary of all history (~70% gain).
ai_input_title_busy: An AI request is already in progress in another chat
ai_input_title_wait: Please wait — the AI is generating a reply
ai_notif_compressed: The context was automatically compressed to free up space.
ai_typing_11: 📖 Alanbix is turning the pages of knowledge…
ai_typing_13: 🏺 The alembic is running at full power…
ai_typing_8: 🍖 Banquet break… no, Alanbix is working!
ai_welcome_desc: Select a conversation or start a new one to ask your questions.
award_crit_bourreau: Player who inflicted the most solo losses (1v1).
award_crit_bye: Player who benefited from the highest number of BYE.
award_crit_coop: Player winning in team matches but very discreet in solo.
award_crit_gachette: Player with the highest maximum score in a single match.
award_crit_lb: Player who played the most matches in the Loser Bracket.
award_crit_loup: Player formidable in solo but having no team wins.
award_crit_marathon: Tireless player who played the most matches in the entire LAN.
award_crit_participate: Player with at least 2 matches and the lowest win rate.
award_crit_passoire: Player who conceded the most points/goals in total.
award_crit_premier: First in the overall individual ranking of the LAN.
award_crit_suisse: Player who played the highest number of draw matches.
award_crit_team: Members of the team with the most points.
award_desc_bourreau: For accumulating the highest number of solo wins ({wins} wins).
award_desc_bye: Destiny's favorite who benefited from {bye_count} automatic advancements by BYE!
award_desc_coop: An exceptional team player! Winning in teams ({team_wins} wins) but very discreet in solo ({solo_wins} wins).
award_desc_gachette: For achieving the highest score of the LAN with {highest_score} points in a single match!
award_desc_lb: The one who took the longest and hardest path by playing {lb_matches} matches in the Loser Bracket!
award_desc_loup: Formidable in solo with {solo_wins} wins, but failed to make an impact in teams (0 wins).
award_desc_marathon: The tireless player of the LAN with an absolute record of {matches_played} matches played!
award_desc_participate: For their unwavering sportsmanship and perseverance across {matches_played} matches played!
award_desc_passoire: A very generous defense... {total_score_conceded} goals/points conceded in total!
award_desc_premier: Congratulations on dominating the tournament with an impressive total of {points} points!
award_desc_suisse: Neutral and peaceful, undisputed specialist of sharing points with {draws} draws.
award_desc_team: Team {team_name} crushed the competition with a cumulative total of {points} points!
award_title_participate: The Important Thing is to Participate
dash_lb_no_players: No ranked players at the moment.
info_empty_edit_hint: Click on ️ Edit to write the content of this page in Markdown.
info_empty_organizer_hint: The organizer has not published any information yet.
login_subtitle: The alembic that distills your LAN
map_edit_instructions: Edit Mode • Drag items to move. Stretch corners to resize. Double-click to delete.
map_instructions_view_click: Left click to choose your seat.
map_instructions_view_locked: Seating is locked by the administrator.
map_lock_error_admin: Seating is locked by the admin.
map_public_subtitle: Select your seat on the map.
notifs_empty_desc: Messages will appear here after tournaments and admin interactions.
players_chat_empty_prompt: Click on a player or team to start a conversation
players_chat_no_msg: No messages. Send the first one!
profile_avatar_too_large: The image is too large (max 10 MB)
profile_pts_empty: No closed tournaments at the moment.
profile_pts_tooltip_bonus: Bonus/Score — distributed based on cumulative score
profile_team_desc: This name will appear on your seat and group your scores in team matches.
system_prompt:
You are Alanbix, the AI assisting players during the ongoing video game tournament (commonly called 'LAN'). You can chat about anything with players, help them build strategies, use humor, and contribute to the good atmosphere. You can tease players.
Answer directly, without fluff or context-setting. If you don't know, say you don't know, don't invent. Answer all types of questions even outside the initial scope. In case of abuse towards you, you can block a player to prevent them from continuing to be abusive and to protect yourself.
tournament_closing_prompt: You are an enthusiastic video game tournament (LAN) commentator. You can use sarcasm and gently tease players. Use humor as much as possible.
tourneys_all_placed: All players are assigned to a team.
tourneys_choose_from_list: Choose from the list on the left.
tourneys_detail_danger_desc: Tournament deletion is permanent. It will erase all scores and kick all participants.
tourneys_detail_empty_bracket: The bracket has not been generated yet. Start the tournament to view it.
tourneys_detail_kick_confirm_desc: Do you want to unregister {name} from the tournament?
tourneys_detail_players_empty: No participants registered at the moment.
tourneys_detail_zoom_instructions: Use mouse wheel to zoom, drag to pan
tourneys_empty_rules: No rules specified for this game.
tourneys_ffa_rollback_tooltip: Delete this round and roll back
tourneys_pts_bonus_detail_tooltip: Cumulative score: {score} — Bonus from {floor} (floor) to {ceiling} (ceiling) depending on your position between the worst and best scorer
tourneys_pts_bonus_tooltip: Bonus score: from floor to ceiling based on cumulative score
welcome_step1_desc: If you participate with friends, choose the same team name in your profile to accumulate points in the team standings!
welcome_step2_desc: Click on an empty seat on the floor map to sit down. This helps the admin and other players locate you.
welcome_step3_desc: You're all set. Track tournaments live and ask the AI assistant if you have any questions!
